violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. ***There are no serve safe employees associated with the establishment. This has been a reoccurring finding for the previous 4 inspections. This will be noted for supervisor review for failure to comply.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Failure to organize and label food containers has been an ongoing finding. With multiple venues operating and using the same space it is critical that food items are properly labeled and organized so all users can best identify the items in storage.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. *** The ice scoop was placed with the open side down on top of a dirty surface. Place the ice scream scoop in a sanitized bin.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. -The ice scoop was not being properly stored between uses.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. *** The rest room doors did not have self closing hinges.
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
